mapper.select:
SELECT gv.row_type, gv.node_id, gv.parent_id,
gv.project_code, gv.project_name, gv.created_on, gv.completed_on, gv.project_status, gv.project_status_name, gv.project_creator_name,
gv.type_code, gv.type_name, gv.type_level, gv.par_type_code, gv.par_type_name, gv.start_at, gv.end_at,
gv.issue_code, gv.par_issue_code, gv.title, gv.priority, gv.issue_status, gv.progress, gv.assignee_code, gv.assignee_name, gv.created_by_code, gv.created_by_name, gv.created_at, gv.started_at, gv.due_at, gv.resolved_at,
vpp.actual_prog, vpp.plan_prog,
vtp.type_actual_prog, vtp.type_plan_prog
FROM gantt_view gv LEFT JOIN VW_PROJECT_PROGRESS vpp ON gv.project_code = vpp.project_code LEFT JOIN VW_TYPE_PROGRESS vtp ON gv.type_code = vtp.type_code
WHERE EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM ( SELECT DISTINCT user_code, project_code FROM VW_USER_PROJECT_AUTH ) vupa WHERE vupa.user_code = #{userCode} AND vupa.project_code = gv.project_code ) AND EXISTS (
SELECT 1 FROM VW_USER_AUTH vua WHERE vua.user_code = #{userCode} AND vua.project_code = gv.project_code AND ( (vua.admin_ck = 'Y' AND vua.status IN ('OD1','OD3')) OR (NVL(vua.admin_ck,'N') = 'N' AND vua.status = 'OD1') ) )
START WITH parent_id IS NULL CONNECT BY PRIOR node_id = parent_id ORDER SIBLINGS BY CASE row_type WHEN 'PROJECT' THEN 1 WHEN 'TYPE' THEN 2 WHEN 'ISSUE' THEN 3 END, type_code, issue_code
